title: Approved Change — ECR-229: Comms encryption upgrade (P-1127 FPGA, P-1125→P-1126)
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-322. Implements ECR-229.
Approved by: Felix Herrera, 2025-02-05.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1125 (Radio Transceiver Original, 500kbps): Obsoleted.
2. P-1126 (Radio Transceiver Enhanced, 2Mbps dual-band): Added to BOM.
3. P-1127 (Encryption Module FPGA, Lattice iCE40 AES-256-GCM): Added to BOM.
4. P-1167 (GCS Radio Unit): Updated to FreeWave GXM paired to P-1126.
5. SRC-018 (encryption_handler.c): Implementation complete, integration tested. Committed 2025-02-14.
6. SRC-024 (gcs_ui_backend.py): Protocol stack updated for encrypted sessions. Jordan Kim, committed 2025-02-28.
7. DOC-471 (Comms System ICD): Updated to Rev C. Encryption framing documented.
8. DOC-472 (Comms Protocol Specification): Updated to Rev B.
9. DRW-531 (Enhanced Antenna Mount): Updated for P-1126 dimensions.
10. Security assessment clearance: Customer security team reviewed encryption design and approved (ref: MD-SEC-2025-01).
